roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROP 47 PET GRANT, REST FN RDCD $150,PET HAS COMP SN OF 364 DAYS OR LESSBASE FINE REDUCED TO $250
PROP 47 PETN GRTD, PROB TERM SUCCESSFUL, REST FINE REDUCED TO $150
/CAL: DA 1203,2PC MOTION/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: THERE IS NO JURISDICTION AS PROBATION EXPIRED 03-01-11, DA WITHDRAW MOTION/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 9 M/CTS: 109/DNACOMP/WS/11590/DTC/LFNEW/RX/VF4:200/X: THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT HAS NO ABILITY TO PAY ATTORNEY'S FEES,PROBATION COSTS, THE PSR OR THE BOOKING FEES,/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD: THIS PROBATION WILL TERMINATE AT THE END OF THE DEFENDANT'S COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE/CCC: THIS CASE AND CASE #10000328/PROB EXT:03-01-11/

/CAL: SENTENCE/X: THE COURT FINDS THERE ARE ERRORS IN THE PRE-SENTENCE REPORT AND WILL CONTINUE THE SENTENCE DATE IN ORDER TO HAVE A NEW REPORT PREPARED,/CTORD: THE PRE-SENTENCE REPORT DATED 12-17-10 SHALL NOT BE USED FOR SENTENCE IN THIS CASE/PRES: 01-07-11/X: THE PROPOSED DISPOSITION IN THIS CASE IS AS FOLLOWS:/X: ISS, 9 M APD, 9M CJ WITH CORRECT CTS CALCULATION, WS, RX, DTC;/X: FINE OF $1000 WITH $3000 PENALTIES, 200VIF;/X: 200 PROBATION FINE STAYED, 50 LAB FEE, 40 COURT SECURITY FEE;/X: 30 ICNA FEE, PROBATION COSTS,/X: THIS SENTENCE WILL BE CONCURRENT WITH SENTENCE IN #10000328,//X: PROBATION IN THIS CASE SHALL TERMINATE UPON COMPLETION OF COUNTY JAIL TERM,/

/CAL: PRETRIAL/AMENDINFO: COUNT THREE AS 11350(A)HS AS A FELONY/FAW/IRR//TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:  3//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 12-17-10/ARBUCKLE/VD: TRIAL DATE OF 12-27-10/DISM3/X: SENTENCE IN THIS CASE WILL BE CONCURRENT WITH SENTENCE IN#10000328,/X: PROBATION IN #10000328 WILL BE THREE YEARS,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE MOTION TO SUPPRESS WAS NOT FILED UNDER THENEW CASE #,/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER TERRENCE SAW/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER THOMASHARVEY/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER JOSEPH ZALAZAR/ARG&SUB/HTA1:2/X:THE MAGISTRATE FINDS THAT THE OFFENSE OF HS 11350(A), LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSES WITHINCOUNT 1 OF HS 11351, SHOWN BY THE EVIDENCE, HAS BEEN COMMITTED; THAT THEREIS SUFFICIENT CAUSE TO BELIEVE THE ABOVE NAMED DEFENDANT GUILTY THEREOF, IT IS ORDERED THAT SAID DEFENDANT BE HELD TO ANSWER TO THE SAME,/871D:1/BAIL:35,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 10-27-10/987,2/BAIL:35,000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LD:01-07-11/987,2/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM/LD:10-27-10/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARYHEARING/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/LD:10-27-10/X:CASE TRANSFERRED TO D-9/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
